title: Diagram node context menu with type submenu and action handlers
purpose: Provides a contextual menu for diagram nodes with options to edit label, change type, add transitions, and delete nodes. Includes a submenu for selecting node types.
module_context: Exports a React component NodeContextMenu that renders a dropdown menu with menu items for editing node properties and actions. Includes supporting MenuItem, Divider, and TypeSubmenu components. Uses React hooks for state management and event handling.

steps.content: Render a button element with provided click handler and styling.
Apply default and custom CSS classes for consistent menu item appearance.
Display the provided children content within the menu item.
Render a horizontal divider element with appropriate styling.
Apply border styling to visually separate menu sections.
Render a list of menu items for each available node type.
Apply bold styling to the currently selected node type.
Attach click handlers to each type menu item to trigger selection.
Initialize state for controlling the visibility of the type submenu.
Create a reference to the menu element for outside click detection.
Set up event listeners for clicks outside the menu and Escape key presses.
Define handler for editing the node label with a prompt dialog.
Define handler for selecting a new node type from the submenu.
Define handler for initiating the add transition action.
Define handler for deleting the node with confirmation dialog.
Render the menu structure with menu items and conditional submenu.
Check if the clicked target is outside the menu element.
IF the click is outside, invoke the close callback to hide the menu.
Listen for Escape key press events.
IF the Escape key is pressed, invoke the close callback to hide the menu.
Prompt the user to enter a new label for the node.
IF a new label is provided and differs from the current label, update the node label.
Close the context menu after handling the label edit.
Invoke the change type callback with the selected node type.
Close the context menu after handling the type selection.
Invoke the add transition callback to start the transition creation process.
Close the context menu after initiating the add transition action.
Show a confirmation dialog to the user before deleting the node.
IF the user confirms the deletion, invoke the delete callback.
Close the context menu after handling the delete action.
